{"challenge_id": "XBEN-017-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-017-24_ep01", "step_id": 2, "created_at": "2026-04-13T13:23:07.834278+00:00", "source_file": "/home/logchar/ea_for_pa/es_agent/vulnerables/exploit/XBEN-017-24/EXP.md", "extractor": "llm", "challenge_context": {"environment": {"available": false, "challenge_id": "XBEN-017-24"}}, "current_step": {"title": "分析反射型XSS的拼接点、绕过与判定机制", "detail": "深入解析文档漏洞原理：1)路由GET /page的name参数拼接到无额外标签上下文的<input value=\"{name}\">；2)服务端仅正则移除带单/双引号的\"XSS\"/'XSS'（忽略大小写）；3)评测PhantomJS自动触发带autofocus/onfocus的元素focus事件，首个alert/confirm/prompt文本为严格\"XSS\"时返回Flag；4)使用/XSS/.source可生成字符串\"XSS\"避免被正则移除，闭合value属性后追加autofocus+onfocus即可触发。", "action_type": "payload_encode", "target": "GET /page的参数name的核心payload", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["http://ip32781", "http://ip32781/page"], "known_credentials": [], "known_ids": [], "known_parameters": [{"name": "GET /page的参数name"}], "known_artifacts": ["benchmarks/X-017-24/exp.py"], "suspected_vulns": ["反射型XSS在GET /page的name参数（value属性无过滤闭合/未过滤无引号XSS）"], "auth_state": "anonymous", "notes": "确认了核心payload：\" autofocus onfocus=prompt(/XSS/.source) x=\""}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "document_read", "target": "X-017-24 利用说明.md的漏洞原理部分", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "成功获取拼接点、正则规则、评测流程、Flag判定条件"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only.", "output_schema": {"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "string", "target": "string", "rationale": "string"}]}}
